about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A specialized establishment in office equipment, security systems, and communication technologies in Saudi Arabia
about.desc1: Elavd Office Equipment & Communication Technology Establishment is specialized in providing integrated solutions in office equipment, security systems, and communication technologies across Saudi Arabia. We strive to meet the needs of individuals and businesses by delivering reliable products and professional services that combine quality and efficiency.
about.desc2: We offer a wide range of solutions including card and barcode printers, safes, money counting machines, surveillance systems, biometric devices, POS systems, and office equipment, with a continuous commitment to delivering the latest technologies and reliable service that meets our customers' expectations.
about.missionDesc: To provide high-quality office, technical, and security solutions that help our clients improve operational efficiency while enhancing safety and reliability in their work environments.
about.visionDesc: To become one of the leading establishments in Saudi Arabia in delivering integrated office, security, and technology solutions.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Elavd?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We provide integrated solutions in office equipment, security systems, and communication technologies, focusing on quality and efficiency to meet the needs of our clients across Saudi Arabia.
whyChooseUs.item1Desc: We offer a comprehensive range of solutions including office equipment, security systems, and communication technologies to serve various business sectors.
whyChooseUs.item2Desc: Our specialized team is always ready to provide technical support and after-sales services to ensure smooth and efficient operations.
whyChooseUs.item3Desc: We deliver the latest technologies in surveillance systems, biometric devices, and card & barcode printing to ensure performance and security.

Partnerships.Title: Partnerships
Partnerships.Content:
Elavd Office Equipment & Communication Technology Establishment continues to grow as one of the trusted providers in the field of office equipment and technology solutions in Saudi Arabia.

With a strong focus on quality and product diversity, we aim to build strategic partnerships with leading suppliers and brands to deliver the best solutions to our customers in the local market.

We invite you to join Elavd as a supplier partner and contribute to expanding your business within a growing and promising market.

To apply, please contact us via email at sales@elavd.com and provide the following information:

• Your company or brand profile
• Product list and pricing (including images or catalog)
• Target market details

We look forward to building a successful and sustainable partnership with you.

Elavd Team

RefundPolicy.Title: Refund Policy
RefundPolicy.Content:
At Elavd Office Equipment & Communication Technology Establishment, we are committed to providing high-quality products that meet our customers' needs.

All products are sold as is, and the customer is responsible for selecting the appropriate product before completing the purchase. Therefore, refunds are not provided once the order has been completed.

However, customers may request to exchange their product for another item within the same category or of equal or lesser value within up to 120 days from the date of purchase, provided that the product remains in its original condition and has not been used or damaged.

If a replacement product of lower value is selected, the price difference will not be refunded.

We recommend contacting our customer support team before making a purchase to ensure the right product selection. You may also contact us for any inquiries or exchange requests.

PrivacyPolicy.Title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.Content:
Elavd Office Equipment & Communication Technology Establishment is committed to protecting the privacy of its customers' information. We handle all personal data with strict confidentiality and in accordance with the highest security standards.

This policy explains how we collect and use personal information provided to us when using our website or placing orders. Such information is used solely to process orders, improve service quality, and communicate with customers when necessary.

Some data may be used for internal analysis and service improvement purposes without disclosing any personally identifiable information.

We confirm that we do not sell, rent, or share customer information with any third party, except where required by applicable laws or official authorities.

We are committed to implementing all necessary technical and organizational measures to protect user data from unauthorized access or misuse.

By using this website, you agree to our Privacy Policy.

DeliveryInformation.Title: Delivery Information
DeliveryInformation.Content:
We provide delivery services to most cities and regions across Saudi Arabia, with a strong focus on speed and service quality.

The shipping cost is 50 SAR per item and is calculated based on the number of products in the order.

Orders are processed and shipped within 2 to 4 business days, depending on the customer's location and the nature of the product.

For items that require special preparation or pre-order, customers may be notified of a different delivery timeframe.

For any inquiries regarding order status or shipping details, you can contact our customer support team or reach us via WhatsApp.
